title: Boss Email Under Deadline
hook: A stressed employee needs a reply that is brief, respectful, and not defensive.

title: Travel Reschedule Tension
hook: The user is juggling flights and a teammate with limited windows.

title: Account Lockout With Panic
hook: The user is locked out before an important deadline and needs calm triage.

title: Refund Exception Ask
hook: The user wants a persuasive but not aggressive refund request.

title: Overwhelmed Friend Message
hook: The user needs help sounding warm without making promises they cannot keep.

title: Weekend Recommendation Mismatch
hook: The user wants something tailored, not a generic list.
